prompt:
Turn this into an interactive flow diagram:

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    A([Start]) --> B[Search Products]
    B --> C{Found results?}
    C -->|Yes| D[Product Detail]
    C -->|No| E[No Results Page]
    E --> B
    D --> F{In Stock?}
    F -->|Yes| G[Add to Cart]
    F -->|No| H[Notify When Available]
    G --> I[Checkout]
    I --> J([Order Confirmed])
```
assertions: Multiple zoom levels (at least 2 distinct views)
Dark theme styling (#0F0F0F or similar dark background)
Start/end nodes use pill or stadium shapes
